text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're training hard to make her dream of
becoming Triple Crown champion a reality.
During this time, she achieves her goal of placing
on the podium in a G1 race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the final cap on her preparations,
Matikanetannhauser decides to go to the
mountains for some special training! I thought she
had something rigorous in mind, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Experts take good care of her during her waterfall
training, she chows down on some pork stew while
she's hiking up the mountain, and she joins a
volleyball team for a run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her final training is much more laid-back than I
expected, but it gives me a sense of how easily
Matikanetannhauser fits in with new people.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When spring comes, it'll finally be time for the
Satsuki Sho! We need to work hard to make sure
we're ready!
